languages.original_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

languages.text: "Прискорбный вывод. Вы в своем праве, но я дерзну удостовериться — не был ли он сделан поспешно? Неужели мои познания и навыки исчерпали свой потенциал?"
"An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"
languages.original_text: "Прискорбный вывод. Вы в своем праве, но я дерзну удостовериться — не был ли он сделан поспешно? Неужели мои познания и навыки исчерпали свой потенциал?"

traits.locale_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"
"An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"
"An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

languages.text: «Un resultado desafortunado. Está en su derecho, pero no puedo evitar preguntarme si se ha apresurado a la hora de tomar esta decisión. ¿Ha agotado el potencial de mis conocimientos y capacidades?».
languages.original_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

traits.locale_text: «Un resultado desafortunado. Está en su derecho, pero no puedo evitar preguntarme si se ha apresurado a la hora de tomar esta decisión. ¿Ha agotado el potencial de mis conocimientos y capacidades?».

languages.text: “真是令人遗憾。您当然有这个权利，但我还是忍不住怀疑，这个决定是不是有些仓促？您真的已经掏空了我的知识和技能吗？”
languages.original_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

traits.locale_text: “真是令人遗憾。您当然有这个权利，但我还是忍不住怀疑，这个决定是不是有些仓促？您真的已经掏空了我的知识和技能吗？”

languages.text: « Voilà qui est regrettable. C'est votre droit, bien sûr, mais je ne peux m'empêcher de me demander si vous n'avez pas pris cette décision à la hâte ? Avez-vous déjà épuisé tout le potentiel de mon savoir et de mes talents ? »
languages.original_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui est regrettable. C'est votre droit, bien sûr, mais je ne peux m'empêcher de me demander si vous n'avez pas pris cette décision à la hâte ? Avez-vous déjà épuisé tout le potentiel de mon savoir et de mes talents ? »

languages.text: "Ein unerfreuliches Ergebnis. Ihr habt natürlich jedes Recht dazu, aber ich frage mich, ob die Entscheidung vielleicht etwas übereilt war. Habt Ihr das ganze Potenzial meines Wissens und meiner Fähigkeiten ausgeschöpft?
languages.original_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

traits.locale_text: "Ein unerfreuliches Ergebnis. Ihr habt natürlich jedes Recht dazu, aber ich frage mich, ob die Entscheidung vielleicht etwas übereilt war. Habt Ihr das ganze Potenzial meines Wissens und meiner Fähigkeiten ausgeschöpft?

languages.text: 「残念な結果だ。あなたの権利の範囲内ではあるが、これは急いで決めたことなのだろうか？私の知識と技術の可能性を使い果たしたのか？」
languages.original_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

traits.locale_text: 「残念な結果だ。あなたの権利の範囲内ではあるが、これは急いで決めたことなのだろうか？私の知識と技術の可能性を使い果たしたのか？」

languages.text: "Talihsiz bir sonuç. Bu sizin en doğal hakkınız ancak acaba bu aceleyle verilmiş bir karar olabilir mi diye düşünmeden edemiyorum. İrfanımın ve becerilerimin potansiyelini tükettiniz mi?"
languages.original_text: "An unfortunate outcome. You are well within your rights, but I cannot help but wonder if this was a decision made in haste? Have you exhausted the potential of my knowledge and skills?"

traits.locale_text: "Talihsiz bir sonuç. Bu sizin en doğal hakkınız ancak acaba bu aceleyle verilmiş bir karar olabilir mi diye düşünmeden edemiyorum. İrfanımın ve becerilerimin potansiyelini tükettiniz mi?"
